name: GNSSGetAbsFilePath
title: GNSSGetAbsFilePath
syntax: long GNSSGetAbsFilePath( char file [], char fileNameWithAbsPath[], long absPathLen )
description: This function gets the absolute path of a file.

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: The file can be defined: with the file name only with the file name and relative path to the current configuration with the absolute path

parameters.name: fileNameWithAbsPath
parameters.description: buffer to which the full path name should be copied

parameters.name: absPathLen
parameters.description: size of the buffer in bytes for the full path name.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
